name: signalMetrics
_note: Derives per-transport signal quality (RSSI/hop/latency) from the REAL TRANSPORT_SPECS plus the caller's observed node quality. A pure read of in-module specs + per-user STATE keyed by ctx.actor.userId — the assassin's owner actor has no nodes, so quality/rssi are null but the metrics row per transport is always present (NEVER no_db).
